metadata.title: João Rocha | Full-stack Developer
metadata.description: Hire a full-stack developer for your project. Online Portfolio

home.tagline: My name is João Rocha and I can help your company to grow with software.

corelli.description: CRM platform designed to streamline business management.

bookingGpt.description: WhatsApp scheduling bot built using OpenAI's model

centralCaverna.description: Productivity app for managing multiple areas of life.

solusVisitas.description: App for creating and inspecting reports in agribusiness.

burgerDelivery.description: Delivery app for a burger restaurant.

web.title: Web Development
web.description: I specialize in web development, building interactive and responsive applications. I use React.js and Next.js to develop modern interfaces, delivering smooth and intuitive experiences with a focus on accessibility and performance.
web.headline: Web apps that

mobile.title: Mobile Development
mobile.description: With experience in mobile development, I build robust apps with React Native. Using React Native and Expo, I deliver smooth, high-performance interfaces for Android and iOS.

apis.title: APIs and RESTful
apis.description: I have a strong understanding of building RESTful APIs, enabling efficient communication between systems. I use Node.js and Express to build scalable APIs, ensuring security and efficiency in data interactions.

uiux.title: UI/UX Design
uiux.description: My approach to UI/UX design focuses on creating interfaces that are not only visually delightful but also offer an intuitive user experience. With strong skills in prototyping and wireframing in Figma, I turn requirements into effective visual solutions, ensuring every design element contributes to usability and accessibility.

database.title: Databases
database.description: I have experience in data management, working with relational SQL and NoSQL databases. I'm familiar with modeling and query optimization, ensuring efficiency in storing and retrieving information.

devops.title: DevOps
devops.description: My experience with DevOps involves automating software development and delivery. I use AWS services and Nginx servers to implement hosting solutions and continuous integration, ensuring agile delivery.

fullstack.title: Full-stack Development
fullstack.description: As a full-stack developer, I work across all layers of development, from front-end to back-end. My proficiency in React, Node.js, Next.js and React Native allows me to deliver complete solutions that provide cohesive experiences and ease maintenance.

about.title: About me
about.p1: I am a programmer and enthusiast of technology, marketing and entrepreneurship. I worked for the last two years as a programmer, the first as a Front-end Developer and the second expanding my knowledge as a Full-stack Developer. I worked for over a year at a startup in my city and today I work as a freelancer, delivering great results and improving myself every day. My specialty includes React, NextJS, Node, Typescript, React Native and SQL.
about.p2: Beyond conventional work, I am also investing in creating tech content on Instagram and YouTube, in order to add value to people's lives and train more professionals like me.

mobileSideral.title: Mobile Developer
mobileSideral.description:
Responsible for mobile development of the SaaS "Central Caverna", a productivity app focused on personal development. Main features: checklists, reminders, tasks, appointments, calendar and API integration, offline storage and saved authentication.
Stack: React Native, Expo, React Hook Forms, Tamagui, React Native Reanimated, MMKV

freelanceFull.title: Full-stack Developer
freelanceFull.description:
Built SaaS projects and Landing Pages with NextJs and Mobile Apps for various clients, sometimes owning UI/UX, other times integration with existing systems, and other times every step through deploy.
Stack: ReactJS, Node.js, NextJs, React Native, Tailwind, SQL, AWS, Nginx, NoSQL

mobileSolus.title: Mobile Developer
mobileSolus.description:
Responsible for the UI and development of the "Solus Laudos" app, focused on the agribusiness niche.
Main features: issuing reports on crops, harvests, offline create/edit/delete of data, image saving and API sync.
Stack: React Native, Expo, React Hook Forms, Tamagui, React Native Reanimated, MMKV

smartnew.title: Full-stack Developer Jr.
smartnew.description:
Responsible for developing screens, dashboards and APIs integrating the company's SaaS.
Responsible for designing and developing two mobile apps — one for internal use and another on demand for another company.
Stack: ReactJS, Node.js, NextJs, React Native, Tailwind, SQL, Nginx, Python, Flask

freelanceFront.title: Frontend Developer
freelanceFront.description: Built projects and pages with HTML, CSS, JS and ReactJS

contact.pitch: From design and wireframe prototyping to the development of large-scale applications, my specialty is delivering results and adding value with every line of code I write. I'm interested in using my skills on full-time and freelance contracts — I guarantee the result. Get in touch and let's build your next SaaS, App or site.
contact.cta: 🔥 I want to hire you now
